name: appsec-threat-modeler
description: Pulls context from Jira, Jenkins, ServiceNow, and a code repository, then runs an end-to-end threat model: data flow diagram, trust boundaries, threat actors, STRIDE threat register, attack-chain mapping, compensating-controls assessment, and gap-based recommendations. Outputs a Word report, an Excel risk register, and draw.io-compatible diagrams. Defaults to Claude Sonnet for cost-efficient analysis; reasoning model is user-configurable.
